name: Creamed Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Thinly sliced cabbage, red or green
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a shallow baking dish, such as a pie pan, with non-stick baking spray.
3. Spread the sliced cabbage evenly in the dish.
4. Scatter sugar, salt, and nutmeg over the cabbage.
5. Pour cream over the cabbage.
6. Top with bread crumbs in an even layer.
7. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
NOTE: This is a very flexible dish. It can bake for an hour at 325°F or a half-hour at 375°F, so it can go into the oven with something else. You may also substitute evaporated skimmed milk for the heavy cream if butterfat is a concern for you, although the dish will not be quite as pleasing in that case.
